Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 318}There's a saying, "He who hunts two hares at once will catch neither."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 318}That means a student like you who's always trying to do two things at once will—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 319}That's something you did too, right, teach?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 319}Last year, you cheated on two girls you met at a group date, and it ended up a disaster...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 319}And in the end, both of them ditched you... Don't worry, I wouldn't do something so lame![n]{f 1 1}
